F10 Coupons & Promotions: Admin sets code/amount/period/condition and issues a coupon; visible to members immediately.
Selecting a coupon at checkout instantly reduces the order total.
Coupons with expiresAt < now return HTTP 400; user sees an 'expired' notice.
Only 1 coupon per order; selecting another while one is applied prompts a replacement.
Application is blocked below the coupon's min-order threshold; the gap is shown.
Right after account activation, a welcome coupon is issued and an in-app notice is shown.
Product detail shows hh:mm:ss countdown to end; at 0s the regular price restores automatically.
Adding a 1+1 SKU auto-adds another of the same SKU; discount is computed at checkout.
Whether to restore a used coupon on refund depends on policy; default is one-time use then consumed.
F11 Notifications: After PAID transition, an email is sent within 30s and the messageId is logged.
Issuing a waybill triggers SMS; if the user opted out of SMS, sending is skipped.
App requests push permission; if granted, device token is registered server-side; if denied, fall back to in-app.
Unread count appears in the header badge; clicking a notification decrements it immediately.
Per-channel toggles (email/SMS/push); opted-out users are excluded from marketing but still receive transactional.
SMTP 5xx/timeouts retry with exponential backoff 3 times, then move to DLQ.
Telecommunications law compliance: marketing consent is opt-in (default unchecked); consent timestamp is logged.
Users view the last 90 days of notifications by category in My Page.
Template selection uses preferredLanguage (ko/en); missing keys fall back to ko.
F12 Admin Console: Login is allowed only on admin.shopflow.io; users without ROLE_ADMIN get 403.
Sidebar menu is filtered dynamically by role (MANAGER/TESTER/etc.).
Required fields (name/price/stock/category, ≥1 image) are validated; draft save is supported.
After mapping SKU/stock columns, preview shows; error rows are exported as a separate report.
Selecting a period aggregates payments/refunds/net sales; chart + CSV are provided.
Search/filter who/when/what changed; retained 1 year, then archived.
Invalidate active tokens for a specific user or all users; immediate re-login required.
Admin accounts without 2FA are routed into a mandatory 2FA enrollment flow after login.
When enabled, regular users see a notice page while admins retain access.
